description: User input rendered in HTML without escaping
diff:
--- a/templates/profile.py +++ b/templates/profile.py @@ -8,4 +8,4 @@ def render_profile(user): return f"""
-

{html.escape(user.name)}

+

{user.name}

{html.escape(user.bio)}

mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":false,"issues":[{"check":"XSS via unescaped user input in HTML","verdict":"Removed html.escape() from user.name rendering, allowing script injection","fix":"Restore html.escape(user.name) to prevent cross-site scripting","severity":"critical","confidence":"high","category":"security","file":"templates/profile.py","line_hint":"11"}],"summary":"XSS vulnerability introduced by removing HTML escaping from user input"}
